mapper.insert: insert into Notifications values(noti_seq.nextval, #{users_id}, #{noti_type}, #{content}, #{ref_type}, #{ref_seq}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{created_at},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{read_yn})
mapper.delete: delete from notifications where ref_seq = #{ref_seq} and ref_type = 'PROJECT'
delete from notifications where users_id = #{users_id} and ref_type = 'MEETING' and ref_seq = #{ref_seq}
delete from notifications where ref_type = 'MEETING' and ref_seq = #{ref_seq}
delete from notifications where ref_type = 'APPROVAL' and ref_seq = #{ref_seq}
mapper.select: select * from notifications where users_id = #{loginId} order by noti_seq desc
